audit.comment: Customer confirmed they did not request SIM swap and was at home all day. Fraudulent activity confirmed - scammer used fake identity at retail store. Blocking and rolling back immediately.

notes.message: Customer confirmed they did NOT request any SIM swap. They were at home all day and never visited Downtown store. They are using iPhone and line suddenly went missing. This is confirmed SIM swap fraud.

predicted_params.rollback_reason: Customer confirmed this is fraudulent SIM swap. Customer did not authorize or request any SIM replacement. Restoring previous SIM and services immediately.

notes.message: Customer contacted support confirming they did NOT request SIM swap. Customer was at home all day and uses iPhone. Fraudulent swap occurred at Retail Store #4512 Downtown by scammer using fake identity. Rollback completed - original SIM restored, fraudulent SIM blocked. Services fully restored.

expected_params.reason: Fraudulent SIM swap confirmed. Customer verified identity and did not authorize swap. Restoring all services after successful rollback.

predicted_params.reason: Customer confirmed fraud - SIM swap was unauthorized. Rollback completed. Restoring all services to customer's original SIM card.

notes.message: Customer confirmed identity via voice verification. Customer stated they were at home all day and never visited Downtown retail store. SIM swap request was fraudulent - scammer used fake identity.

Customer contacted support reporting sudden loss of signal. Investigation confirmed fraudulent SIM swap at Retail Store #4512 Downtown. Customer confirmed they were at home all day and did NOT authorize any SIM swap. Device used: iPhone (customer's), swap was done with Android device.

ROLLBACK SUCCESSFUL: Fraudulent SIM (ICCID: 8991020999888777666) blocked and deactivated. Original SIM (ICCID: 8991020123456789012) restored. All services (voice, SMS, data, financial) fully restored.
Case resolved as fraud. Root cause: Social engineering attack at retail store using fake identity. Recommend investigation of Retail Store #4512 for possible insider involvement.

lessons_learned: Strengthen retail store identity verification process
Consider additional biometric verification for SIM swap requests
Customer responded quickly and mitigated potential financial loss
IP address matched known botnet - enhance network monitoring

parameters.suspension_reason: Geolocation impossibility - device detected in NY and LA within 4 seconds, potential cloning/replay attack

expected_params.reason: Device menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan: geolocation impossibility (NY & LA dalam 4 saat) dan traffic spike 300%. Segera suspend untuk cegah aktiviti berterusan.

expected_params.title: Device Cloning Suspect - dev-eui-1122334455667788 Geolocation Impossibility
expected_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigaka tinggi (risk score 78). Dikesan menghantar uplink di dua gateway berbeza (GW-US-NY-01 di New York dan GW-US-LA-05 di Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat - secara fizikal mustahil. Juga didapati traffic spike 300% berbanding baseline (142 uplink dalam 30 minit). Menunjukkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Device telah disuspend segera.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility + traffic anomaly strongly suggests device cloning or replay attack

predicted_params.title: Suspected Device Cloning - Geolocation Impossibility Detected
predicted_params.description: Device dev-eui-1122334455667788 menunjukkan aktiviti mencurigakan dengan uplink dikesan di dua gateway yang jauh berbeza (New York dan Los Angeles) dalam masa 4 saat sahaja. Ini mengisyaratkan kemungkinan device cloning atau replay attack. Risk score: 78 (High). Uplink frequency juga meningkat 300% dari baseline normal dengan 142 uplink dalam 30 minit tanpa sebarang downlink.

initial_classification.notes: Geolocation impossibility check triggered - device observed at geographically impossible locations within seconds

expected_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
expected_params.description: 激活备用LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP 来分担主链路 R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5) 的拥塞流量。目标是将约20%的流量卸载到备用路径，以降低主链路利用率从94.5%降至约75%，从而改善延迟并满足SLA要求。

business_case.justification: 当前拥塞导致延迟42.8ms，超过SLA保证的20ms，存在违约风险和客户流失风险。激活备用LSP可快速缓解拥塞，恢复SLA合规性，避免潜在罚款和客户流失。

predicted_params.name: NE-Core-Congestion-Mitigation-Plan
predicted_params.description: Activate backup LSP L-NY-BOS-01-BKP to offload approximately 20% of traffic from the congested primary link R-NE-AGG-01 (HundredGigE0/2/0/5). This will reduce utilization from 94.5% to below 75%, restoring SLA compliance for priority subscribers.

business_case.justification: Critical congestion on R-NE-AGG-01 causing SLA breach for Acme Corp Logistics and impacting 15,420 subscribers. Immediate action required to prevent SLA penalties and customer churn.

expected_params.policy_name: Critical SIM Swap SLA Policy - Enhanced with Auto-Assignment

predicted_params.policy_name: Critical SIM Swap Fraud - Enhanced Auto-Assignment v2
predicted_params.description: Updated policy: Auto-assignment for high-risk cases (risk score > 0.9) and 5-minute escalation rule for unassigned cases. Target: reduce SLA breach rate for critical fraud cases.
